titleStmt.title: SII 11.183: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 183. (B.K. No. 243 of 1927-28.) SHIRŪR, BĀGALKŌṬ TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SIDDHĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 24, Pramāthin, Phālguṇa, ba. 5, Sunday. The date appears to be irregular. In Pramāthin, Phālguṇa ba. 5 fell on Friday = A.D. 1100, March 2. If ba. 5 is a mistake for ba. 7, the equivalent would be A.D. 1100, March 4, Sunday. The inscription registers a grant of land made by Prasannarāśi-Paṇḍita, the āchārya of the temple of Siddhēśvaradēva, to the tank called Bāchiseṭṭiyakeṟe. The plot of land granted formed part of the property of the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī cāḷukyavikramavarṣada 24 neya pramāthisaṁvatsarada pālguṇa bahu
ḷa 5 Ādityavāradaṁdu śrīsiddhēśvaradēvara sthānadācāryya prasannarāsi
paṇṇitadēvaru dēvara poladoḷage bāciseṭṭiya keṟege biṭṭa keṟeya keḷage gē
ṇa kariya keyi mattar 4 .
Digital edition of SII 11.183 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
